message:
fix(tests): update token validation tests for client_identity requirement

validate_token now requires client_identity when tokens use identity:secret
format. Update 3 tests to provide matching client_identity parameter:

- validate_token_passes_matching_identity_tokens: add Some("agent-1")
- validate_token_identity_matching_is_case_insensitive: add Some("agent-1")
- validate_token_multiple_colons: add Some("agent")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
